calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-14-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Sacramento for plaintiff Zzelma Edbert, Robert Rosenberg in pro per

The parties placed a stipulation for judgment on the record as follows: Possession and restitution to the plaintiff. Defendant will vacate the premises located at 333 Mt. Vernon, San Francisco, at 5:00 PM on 5/2/2005. Plaintiff will waive back rent if premises vacated. Mutual release - parties to bear own costs of suit. If defendant fails to comply plaintiff may with 24 hours notice seek ex-parte judgment for immediate entry and possession and rent Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Steven Taxman, Clerk: Don Feinberg; Reporter Maria Torreano

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2005 Advanced From Apr-04-05 To Mar-23-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

ORDER ADVANCING TIME TO HEAR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert Rosenberg, defendant in propria persona
RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. The Defendant did not give notice to plaintiff that he was going to appear and argue. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT ROBERT ROSENBERG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/eh) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
